description: Seed catalog of codeable factor/tactical strategies for backtesting and leaderboard ranking. Claims and citations are informational—validate in your own pipeline.

strategies.name: Fama-French Quality + Value (QMJ + HML)
strategies.rules_summary: Score quality (ROIC, gross margin, low D/E); top 20% quality; within that, cheapest by P/B or P/FCF; signal long top quintile / avoid or short bottom quintile.
implementation_notes: Define composite quality z-score from cross-section each rebalance date.
Value tie-break within quality subset: rank on P/B and/or P/FCF (document which).

strategies.name: Momentum (12-1 Month)
strategies.rules_summary: Rank by 12-month return excluding most recent month; hold top 10–20%; equal weight.
implementation_notes: Skip 21 trading days or calendar month per your spec; align across names.
Exclude recent IPOs with insufficient history.

strategies.name: Low Volatility Anomaly
strategies.rules_summary: Rank by 252-day realized volatility (annualized); hold lowest 20%; equal or vol-weighted.
implementation_notes: Use overlapping windows consistently; consider sector/neutral variants to reduce sector bets.

strategies.name: Magic Formula (Greenblatt)
strategies.rules_summary: Rank earnings yield (EBIT/EV) and ROIC; combine ranks; hold top 20–30; equal weight; annual rebalance.
implementation_notes: Exact Greenblatt definitions for EV and invested capital must match your data vendor.
Greenblatt book backtests are illustrative; out-of-sample results vary.
references: Greenblatt, The Little Book That Beats the Market

strategies.name: Dual Momentum (Gary Antonacci)
strategies.rules_summary: Assets: SPY, EFA, cash/T-bills proxy (BIL/SHY). If SPY 12m <= T-bills, go defensive; else pick SPY vs EFA by 12m relative strength.
implementation_notes: Not an S&P 500 stock strategy—separate leaderboard category or filter.
Use total return indices; align month-end vs month-start consistently.

strategies.name: Dogs of the Dow
strategies.rules_summary: Year-end: rank Dow 30 by dividend yield; buy top 10; equal weight; hold 1 year.
implementation_notes: Universe is Dow 30, not S&P 500—label clearly on leaderboard.
references: Dogs of the Dow popular strategy literature

strategies.name: 52-Week High Momentum
strategies.rules_summary: Score price / 52-week high; buy top quintile (closest to high).
implementation_notes: Define 52-week window on same calendar for all names; handle corporate actions.

strategies.name: FCF Yield + Buyback Yield (Shareholder Yield)
strategies.rules_summary: Rank by FCF yield + net buyback yield + dividend yield; hold top 20%.
implementation_notes: Buyback yield needs clean shares outstanding and buyback from cash flow statement.
Financials may need adjusted FCF definitions.

strategies.name: Value + Momentum Combo (AQR Style)
strategies.rules_summary: Value score from inverted percentiles of P/E, P/B, P/FCF; momentum from 12-1 return percentile; 50/50 blend; top 20%.
implementation_notes: Cross-sectional ranks each month; handle missing fundamentals.

strategies.name: ROIC + Revenue Growth (Buffett-Quantified)
strategies.rules_summary: ROIC > 15% for 3 consecutive years; revenue growth > 8% YoY; rank survivors by P/FCF ascending.
implementation_notes: ROIC definition must be fixed (NOPAT/invested capital, etc.).
YoY revenue on fiscal or calendar basis—pick one.
